title: Apparatus for fluid delivery and lactation stimulation
abstract: A supplemental nutrition apparatus is disclosed herein. The supplemental nutrition apparatus may comprise a reservoir coupled to and in fluid communication with a fluid passageway, wherein the fluid passageway is configured to communicate fluid from the reservoir to a fluid passageway outlet, and a support element configured to engage a user, to at least partially support the fluid passageway, and to position the fluid passageway outlet proximate to the user's nipple.
claims: Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A supplemental nutrition apparatus comprising: a reservoir coupled to and in fluid communication with a fluid passageway, wherein the fluid passageway is configured to communicate fluid from the reservoir to a fluid passageway outlet; and a support element configured to engage a user, to at least partially support the fluid passageway, and to position the fluid passageway outlet proximate to the user芒聙聶s nipple. 2. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 1, further comprising at least one support frame configured to removably secure the supplemental nutrition apparatus to the user芒聙聶s breast. 3. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 2, wherein the at least one support frame comprises a unitary support frame. 4. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 2, further comprising at least one fluid passageway support eyelet coupled to the at least one support frame. 5. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 1, wherein the reservoir comprises a reservoir outlet configured to communicate fluid from the reservoir to the fluid passageway. 6. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 5, wherein the reservoir further comprises at least one guide hook. 7. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 6, wherein the reservoir further comprises a reservoir mounting element. 8. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 7, wherein the reservoir further comprises a check valve. 9. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 1, further comprising an attachment element disposed on the reservoir and configured to removably couple the supplemental nutrition apparatus to the user. 10. A supplemental nutrition apparatus comprising: a support element belt comprising an elongated central portion disposed between a first belt attachment and a second belt attachment; and at least one fluid passageway fastener disposed on the elongated central portion, wherein the support element belt is configured to removably secure the supplemental nutrition apparatus to a user. 11. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 10, further comprising at least one fluid passageway support eyelet disposed on the support element belt. 12. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 10, wherein the at least one fluid passageway fastener comprises an aperture disposed in and defined by the elongated central portion. 13. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 12, wherein the at least one fluid passageway fastener is configured to be disposed in a child芒聙聶s mouth during use of the supplemental nutrition apparatus. 14. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 10, wherein the first belt attachment and the second belt attachment comprise an adhesive disposed on a back side of the support element belt. 15. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 14, wherein the support element belt is configured to adhere directly to a user芒聙聶s breast. 16. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 10, further comprising a unitary support frame, wherein the first belt attachment and the second belt attachment comprise at least one of apertures, clips, clasps, and hooks, and wherein the first belt attachment and the second belt attachment are configured to couple the support element belt to the unitary support frame. 17. A supplemental nutrition apparatus comprising: a reservoir coupled to and in fluid communication with a fluid passageway, wherein the fluid passageway is configured to communicate fluid from the reservoir to a fluid passageway outlet; and a support element configured to engage a user, to at least partially support the fluid passageway, and to position the fluid passageway outlet proximate to the user芒聙聶s nipple; wherein the support element comprises a support element belt comprising an elongated central portion disposed between a first belt attachment and a second belt attachment; and at least one fluid passageway fastener disposed on the elongated central portion, wherein the support element belt is configured to removably secure the supplemental nutrition apparatus to the user. 18. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 17, wherein the reservoir comprises a reservoir outlet configured to communicate fluid from the reservoir to the fluid passageway. 19. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 18, wherein the reservoir further comprises at least one guide hook. 20. The supplemental nutrition apparatus of claim 19, wherein the reservoir further comprises a reservoir mounting element.
